evidence_summary: The scene must capture the scale of the Thark expeditionary force in motion while grounding the narrative in John Carter's internal struggle. The visual language should contrast the massive, moving column of the march with the intimate, isolated emotional s...

As the expeditionary force begins its march toward Thark, John Carter reflects on his deep love for Dejah Thoris and the agonizing misunderstanding caused by Barsoomian social customs that have led to her coldness toward him.
